chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Suit No.162 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.2239/2024. 13.08.2024 Mr. Ahmed Ali Hussain, advocate for the plaintiff. Mr. Javed Ali Sangi, advocate for the defendants. Counsel for the SRB submits that a show cause notice has been issued to the plaintiff and prior to adjudication of the same, in accordance with law, no coercive action shall be taken against the plaintiff. Learned counsel for the plaintiff is satisfied with the material representation and has no cavil if the suit is disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Khuhro/PA
